curation_notes: Pre-assigned as buffer-overflow from CWE-119, but CWE-119 does not apply to a JavaScript BigInteger-based RSA library — there are no raw memory buffers. The patch adds input length validation to RSA decryption (RSADecrypt, RSADecryptOAEP in ext/rsa2.js) and signature verification (verifyWithMessageHash in src/rsasign-1.2.js) to reject ciphertexts and signatures whose hex length does not match the RSA modulus size. This prevents malleability via prepended zero bytes. Reclassified to crypto-weakness. Locations derived from the patch diff: only ext/rsa2.js and src/rsasign-1.2.js had substantive source changes (all other changed files are minified bundles, docs, configs, or tests). verifyWithMessageHashPSS already had the length check pre-patch and was not vulnerable.
